# Golden parser fixtures

Fixtures in this directory are minimal, synthetic or de-identified VRP/USG
snippets used to reproduce parser and audit behavior.

Rules:

- No production configs.
- No live IPs, credentials, SNMP communities, keys, customer names or topology
  labels.
- Prefer documentation IP ranges (`192.0.2.0/24`, `198.51.100.0/24`,
  `203.0.113.0/24`) or clearly synthetic private ranges.
- Every fixture used by parser tests should have a corresponding `SourceRef`
  assertion.
- Non-UTF-8 cases, such as GB18030/GBK Chinese configs, should usually be
  generated by tests at runtime so the repository stays text-friendly.

See `docs/de-identifying-configs.md` for the full de-identification workflow.
